text: filename name file (full path)–include file extension download_directory wherever data downloaded –must relative path extract_definition object resulting define_extract_micro() refresh true, execute API query, even data already stored locally

title: Read Cached IPUMS Microdata — read_ipums_micro_cached
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ read_ipums_micro_cached(   filename = "acs_insurance_race_2022_1yr_repweights",   download_directory = "data",   extract_definition = define_micro_extract(     collection = "usa",     description = "2022 ACS 1-year sample with replicate weights - insurance and race",     samples = c("us2022a"),     variables = list(       "HCOVANY",       var_spec("RACE", case_selections = c("1", "2")),       "REPWT"),   refresh = FALSE)) } # }
